sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click all remaining G corners for 13 N blocks
# Top row blocks (rows 25-29): cols 19-23, 25-29, 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53
# Bottom row blocks (rows 31-35): cols 13-17, 19-23, 25-29, 31-35, 37-41, 43-47, 49-53

actions = []
# Top row blocks
for col_start in [19, 25, 31, 37, 43, 49]:
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': col_start+1})
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 25, 'col': col_start+3})
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 29, 'col': col_start+1})
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 29, 'col': col_start+3})

# Bottom row blocks
for col_start in [13, 19, 25, 31, 37, 43, 49]:

    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 31, 'col': col_start+3})
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': col_start+1})
    actions.append({'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 35, 'col': col_start+3})

print(f"Total actions: {len(actions)}")
result = action(actions)
print(f"Result: {result}")
print(f"Game over: {result.get('game_over', False)}")
print(f"Level completed: {result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check state
seg = current_frame.segmentation
n_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"N blocks remaining: {len(n_blocks)}")

# Check ascii
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nN block area after:")
for r in range(24, 37):
    print(f"  Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][12:55]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
